description: Result source index for SkillGuardGraph. Tags every result table with its evidence source, generation command, and claim boundary.

detection_eval.claim_boundary: Artifact-consistency evidence only. Cannot be cited as proof of real-world detection.

ablation.claim_boundary: Shows relative importance of evidence layers on synthetic data. Static/sandbox showing no drop reflects signal overlap in synthetic data, not real-world independence.

per_class_recall.claim_boundary: All seven synthetic attack classes reach 100% recall. This is benchmark closure, not real-world recall proof.

runtime_redteam.claim_boundary: Synthetic trace-replay evaluation. Does not constitute production runtime evidence.

runtime_harness.claim_boundary: Local instrumented toy harness with 105+105 tasks. Stronger than trace replay but not production runtime.

sandbox_harness.claim_boundary: Subprocess-isolated toy sandbox. Does not constitute arbitrary third-party skill sandboxing.

third_party_sandbox.claim_boundary: 3 curated public-code fixtures. Not arbitrary marketplace execution.

corpus_package_sandbox.claim_boundary: 3 bounded PyPI package cases from the real corpus. Not arbitrary package execution.

github_repo_sandbox.claim_boundary: 2 source-available GitHub entrypoints. Not arbitrary repository execution.

typescript_repo_sandbox.claim_boundary: 2 source-available TS/JS entrypoints. Not arbitrary repository execution.

remote_endpoint_audit.claim_boundary: 4 unauthenticated public endpoint probes. Not authenticated or task-level runtime.

remote_task_audit.claim_boundary: 2 harmless read-only tool calls on public endpoints. Not production integration.

significance_tests.claim_boundary: McNemar + paired bootstrap on synthetic benchmark. Significant but synthetic.

generalization_eval.claim_boundary: Stress checks reduce leakage risk but remain within the same generator family.

independent_benchmark.claim_boundary: Different vocabulary and code patterns but same generator architecture.

bootstrap_ci.claim_boundary: Degenerate CI because synthetic benchmark has zero errors.

latency.claim_boundary: Prototype latency on synthetic data. Real deployment overhead may differ.

failure_analysis.claim_boundary: Zero errors on synthetic benchmark is artifact-consistency evidence.

real_ecosystem.claim_boundary: Passive catalog-level measurement. Not code-complete security audit.

public_advisory_audit.claim_boundary: Cross-check against known MCP advisories. 4 of 5 tracked families present in corpus, all patched.

synthetic_ecosystem.claim_boundary: Synthetic stress-test data, not real-world prevalence estimates.
